feature_residual_signal_summary: Projection ratio < 0.005 across all datasets. Stability residual has near-zero correlation with feature cosine (r < 0.01). Residual AUC for bad-edge detection: 0.65 (vs feature AUC 0.69). The stability signal provides information beyond feature similarity.
failure_modes: CiteSeer FSCC: paired delta +0.72pp (p=0.2555, not significant at 0.05). Stability signal weaker on CiteSeer where feature similarity is already informative.
PubMed FSCC: paired delta +0.84pp (p=0.1054, not significant at 0.05). PubMed is larger and feature-only is near-optimal; stability adds marginal signal.
Gradient confidence/abstention adds minimal value: shuffled gradient control performs comparably to real gradient (search phase). The stability signal alone drives the improvement.
